headline: Is NVR, Inc. (NVR) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is NVR a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on NVR, Inc. on The Wealth Dynasty Report’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on NVR. NVR, Inc.’s share was trading at $6,530.69 as of March 23rd. NVR’s trailing and forward P/E were 14.59 and 16.10 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. NVR, Inc. (NVR) […]
